headline: This is why Visa Inc. (V) is one of The Best Forever Stocks to Buy According to Analysts
summary: Visa stock (NYSE:V) is one of the best forever stocks to buy, according to analysts. The bullish stance follows a chat with the company’s CEO, Ryan Mclnerney, who reiterated that value-added services offer a larger opportunity […]
